title: Top 2 Orders Per Customer With Ties
description: Retrieve the top 2 highest order amounts per customer, including ties.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id, amount FROM (SELECT *, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY amount DESC) rnk FROM orders) WHERE rnk <= 2;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

ranking_window = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(col("amount").desc())

result = (
    orders.withColumn("rnk", dense_rank().over(ranking_window))
    .filter(col("rnk") <= 2)
    .select("customer_id", "amount")
)
